name: Petro U.S.A. Inc.
summary: Petro U.S.A., Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to operate truck stops and travel centers, which offers diesel fuel and gasoline, full service and fast food restaurants, maintenance and repair service for trucks, and groceries and convenience goods. Previously, it was engaged in the land development, and construction and sale of residential housing businesses in the eastern United States and Argentina. The company is based in Liverpool, New York. Petro U.S.A., Inc. is a subsidiary of Sea Alive Inc.
